value.found_quote: To secure your workstation while enabling autonomous workflows, Antigravity CLI integrates a robust **Fine-Grained Permissions Engine**. Every sensitive operation the agent performs is represented as a **permission resource** formatted as `action(target)`.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a Fine-Grained Permissions Engine in Antigravity CLI that evaluates every sensitive operation across allow/deny/ask access lists using the action(target) scheme, matching all elements of the claim.
